pattern: Divide and conquer on every operator splits the expression into independent left and right sub-expressions whose result sets are combined by applying that operator to every pair.
hints: Each operator in the expression can serve as the last operation computed; splitting there gives independent sub-problems.
Recursively compute all possible values for the left and right sub-expressions, then combine each left value with each right value using the current operator.
Memoize the results for each substring so sub-expressions shared by multiple splits are only evaluated once.

edge_inputs.description: mixed operators with multiple outcomes including duplicates
multiplication distributes across subtraction creating repeated values
all additions, many groupings but same sum each time
three operators yield five groupings (Catalan number)

stress.description: expression of alternating single digits and operators up to length 19
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    ops = ['+', '-', '*']
    num_ops = min(max(1, size), 9)
    parts = [str(rng.randint(1, 9))]
    for _ in range(num_ops):
        parts.append(rng.choice(ops))
        parts.append(str(rng.randint(1, 9)))
    return [''.join(parts)]
stress.note: size caps at 9 operators (19 chars) to keep Catalan blowup manageable
